criteria.reason: Proxy tool-state mismatch recovery is now applied for both thrown and response-body errors, with regression coverage.
Stored-token decrypt failures now degrade to null/relink-required auth misses instead of crashing Telegram turns.
Moon requests now use deterministic count_moons on local SDE; production reproduction confirms a single-tool bounded path.
Adjacent warm-turn and private-ESI recurrence paths were hardened, and remaining polling risk is documented.
Evidence bundle separates app/runtime failures from direct proxy latency and includes production deployment proof.

commands_run: npm run test -- tests/unit/warm-cold-path.test.ts tests/unit/moon-count.test.ts tests/unit/sso.test.ts tests/unit/tools.test.ts
